Redesign pitch · v2

Chef Penguino, plated properly.

A premium pass over navigation, home, and settings — plus the new gold-coin economy and animation shop. The phone on the left is live: tap the bottom tabs, buy an animation in the Shop, or trigger the coin milestone. Game mechanics are untouched.

i

Penguino Coins

EarnEvery 12 pizzas you bake, Chef Penguino sells them for a Penguino Coin. Your lifetime total pizza count will not be affected.
SpendUse coins to unlock awesome new animations in the Animation Shop!

What's wrong today

  • One button, four times. Start / Pizzas / Friends / Settings are identical yellow pills — nothing reads as primary, so the home screen feels like a prototype.
  • Settings floats mid-screen. Title and controls are vertically centered with full-width pills for toggles. Reads as unfinished.
  • The best art is hidden. The shopfront only appears on the Pizzas page — home wastes it on a blurred backdrop.
  • No status bar. Pizza count is buried and there's nowhere for a coin balance to live.

The fixes

  • Persistent bottom tab bar. Home · Shop · Friends · Settings — always reachable, no more drill-in-and-back-arrow.
  • Home is a dashboard. Shopfront hero up top, pizza + coin counts pinned top-right, one clear fire-orange Start Cooking button, recent sessions below.
  • Two pizza numbers, as you asked. Lifetime pizzas (the leaderboard stat, never resets) and Pizzas in shop (0–12, resets each coin).
  • Grouped settings list. Top-aligned iOS-style sections — Profile, Audio, Focus, Account — real switches, not pills.
  • Coins reserved a distinct metallic gold so they never blur into the orange UI accent.

Gold-coin economy

Earn pizzas by focusing → Shop counter hits 12 → 🪙 popup + +1 coin → counter resets to 0
  • Waving stays free and equipped by default. Sniffing & eating start locked at 1 coin each.
  • Coin balance = ⌊lifetime ÷ 12⌋ − animations bought. Pizzas-in-shop = lifetime mod 12. Both derive from one number, so nothing can desync.
  • Needs a small Supabase migration: an owned_animations column on profiles. Leaderboard keeps sorting by lifetime pizzas.

Try it: open the Shop and buy an animation, or trigger the 12-pizza milestone.

Placeholder note

  • The gold coin here is a CSS stand-in. Drop in your real coin art and it slots straight into the chips, tiles, shop, and popup.
  • Animation thumbnails reuse existing shop stills — the real cards would show a looping preview of each clip.

Interactive mockup · nothing here is wired to real data — it's a design proposal for sign-off before code changes.
